nodes.name: 柳雷鸟
nodes.summary: 柳雷鸟（Willow ptarmigan，学名 Lagopus lagopus），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 柳雷鸟（学名：Lagopus lagopus），或稱柳松雞，在松鸡家族中是一种中等体型的鸟，主要分布于欧亚大陆的北部至蒙古、乌苏里及萨哈林岛，但也見於北美洲地區。它已被列为中国国家二级重点保护野生动物，此外亦是美國阿拉斯加州的州鳥。 别名 柳雷鸟有许多别名：雷鸟、柳鸡、苏衣尔、…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The willow ptarmigan breeds in birch and other forests and moorlands in northern Europe, the tundra of Scandinavia, Siberia, Alaska and Canada, in particular in the provinces of Newfoundland and Labrador and Quebec

links.evidence: It is native to Canada and the United States, China, Mongolia, the Russian Federation, Kazakhstan, the Czech Republic, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania. It primarily occupies subalpine and subarctic habitats such as sparse pine and birch forests, thickets with willow and alder trees, heather moors, tundra and mountain slopes
